title: UPM Orchestration System — Live Status
description: How the /upm skill coordinates with /plane-pm, /ralph, /formation, and /ship to deliver features end-to-end

prs.title: v6.4.0 Skills UX overhaul — WCAG AA, Fix Wizard
UAT testing panel — self-service system validation
v5.1.0 Management Suite, universal rename, showcase
v4.2.0 Dynamic APM — SkillsRegistry, enhanced tasks
v4.0.0 Formation UX integration, wave tracking
Scoped notifications, graph hierarchy, toast system

nodes.label: /upm
nodes.description: Unified Project Management — coordinates the full delivery pipeline

nodes.label: /plane-pm
nodes.description: Plane PM API — creates cycles, modules, issues; tracks state transitions

nodes.label: /ralph
nodes.description: Ralph autonomous agent — implements stories sequentially with gate checks

nodes.label: /formation
nodes.description: Formation deploy — hierarchical agent structure per wave

nodes.label: /ship
nodes.description: Source Control Excellence — creates PR, syncs Plane, closes the loop

nodes.label: /ccem-apm
nodes.description: APM server — tracks all formation agent registration and telemetry

nodes.label: prd.json
nodes.description: Wave-structured PRD — source of truth for story definitions and pass/fail state

waves.title: Hooks + CCEMHelper Swift
waves.gate: mix compile PASS + swift build -c release PASS + hooks <100ms

waves.title: Showcase + Release
waves.gate: mix compile PASS + swift build PASS + showcase renders v7.0.0

next_initiative.title: Maximal Modularization — Plugin/Integration Engine Standard
next_initiative.objective: Decompose all non-foundational APM features into a formal Plugin/Integration engine standard, establishing stable extension points and enabling per-feature lifecycle management.

foundation.description: Core observability layer. Always on, non-removable. No external dependencies.

plugins.description: Self-contained APM features. Own GenServers, LiveViews, API routes. Enable/disable via PluginRegistry.
plugins.contract: ApmV5.Plugins.PluginBehaviour (extended v2 — adds supervisor_children/0, live_views/0, on_enable/0, on_disable/0, default_enabled?/0)

integrations.description: External protocol/system bridges. Own supervisor, event adapter, API routes. Connect APM to outside world.
integrations.contract: ApmV5.Integrations.IntegrationBehaviour (new — integration_name/0, protocol/0, connect/1, disconnect/0, status/0, handle_event/2, supervisor_children/0)

squadrons.name: Architecture Squadron
squadrons.mission: Catalog all 90+ modules, define Plugin/Integration taxonomy, extend PluginBehaviour, author IntegrationBehaviour

squadrons.name: Plugin Extraction Swarm
squadrons.mission: Extract 8 existing modules as conformant plugins (ralph, formations, uat, skills, ports, usage, devops, alerting)
squadrons.structure: swarm — each agent owns one plugin extraction end-to-end

squadrons.name: Integration Extraction Squadron
squadrons.mission: Extract auth/ and ag_ui/ subsystems as integrations; build IntegrationRegistry GenServer
squadrons.structure: parallel agents per integration + shared registry

squadrons.name: Infrastructure Squadron
squadrons.mission: Plugin/Integration lifecycle: PluginRegistry v2 (dynamic enable/disable), IntegrationRegistry, Application.ex supervision refactor, Router auto-registration, PluginDashboardLive integrations tab

squadrons.name: Quality & Release Squadron
squadrons.mission: mix compile --warnings-as-errors, OpenAPI spec update, v8.0.0 CHANGELOG + mix.exs, showcase features + design decisions

gate_checks: All existing LiveViews continue to render
